## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Documentation checklist (Doc-Driven Development)

Per our engineering rules, docs lead implementation. Confirm the docs are updated:

- [ ] Roadmap updated (if scope changed)
- [ ] Feature Specification created/updated
- [ ] Architecture updated (if the design changed)
- [ ] API Specification updated (if endpoints/contracts changed)
- [ ] Database Design updated (if the data model changed)
- [ ] Decision Log entry added (if a notable decision was made)
- [ ] Release Notes updated

## Testing

<!-- If UI or voice behavior changed. -->
